betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Bitumen§f

§aA viscous, heavy residue from oil refining — useful for asphalt, cracking, and coke production!§f

Bitumen is a thick, polluting liquid produced as a byproduct when processing §bHeavy Oil§f in the §bFractioning Tower§f. Every §e500mB§f of Heavy Oil yields §e150mB§f of Bitumen alongside §e350mB§f of Industrial Oil.

§6Production§f:
§b• Fractioning Tower§f (primary): Process §bHeavy Oil§f → §e150mB§f Bitumen + §e350mB§f Industrial Oil per §e500mB§f.
§b• Chemical Plant§f: Combine §bTar Sand§f + §bOil Tar§f for §e1,000mB§f Bitumen.
§b• Industrial Liquefaction Machine§f: Process §bCoal Tar§f, §bOil Tar§f, or §bCrack Oil Tar§f for smaller yields.
§b• Fractioning Tower§f (alt): Process §bCoal Tar Creosote§f → §e90mB§f Bitumen + §e10mB§f Coal Oil.

§6Uses§f:
§b• Asphalt§f: Combine §e1,000mB§f Bitumen + §e2×§f Gravel + §e6×§f Sand in a §bChemical Plant§f → §e16×§f Asphalt blocks. Asphalt increases player movement speed by §e50%§f.
§b• Catalytic Cracking Tower§f: Crack §e100mB§f Bitumen + §e200mB§f Steam → §e80mB§f Crude Oil + §e20mB§f Aromatic Hydrocarbons.
§b• Coker Unit§f: §e16,000mB§f Bitumen → §e1×§f Petroleum Coke + §e1,600mB§f Coker Oil.
§b• Industrial Solidification§f: §e100mB§f Bitumen → §e1×§f Oil Tar.

§eTip§f: Bitumen is highly inefficient to coke directly (§e16,000mB§f per coke). It is far better to fraction it down first, then process the resulting products.
